root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_1st_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_2nd_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_3rd_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_4th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_5th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_6th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_7th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_8th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_9th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_10th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_11th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_12th_month, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.ending_balance FROM sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail where ( sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no::numeric < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_1st_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_2nd_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_3rd_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_4th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_5th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_6th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_7th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_8th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_9th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_10th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_11th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.incr_12th_month < 0 or sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.ending_balance < 0 ) /*WHERE*/
